title: myobroma pubiflora
side_effects: Myobroma pubiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, improper use of Myobroma pubiflora may also cause dizziness, headaches, and respiratory issues due to its toxic compounds. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
